Text: Not only was Devon's editing impeccable, it was also humane. Devon managed to fix the unfixable and constructively criticized his peers in a way that instilled a confidence they would never repeat their mistakes. Good editors are far from rare, but teachers like Devon are the opposite: irreplaceable.

To Whom It May Concern:      I am happy to be able to write in very strong support of Devon Wells for any future endeavor he pursues. I worked with Devon for roughly fourteen months at a small English training school in Dalian, China, during which time, Devon's knowledge and honest viewpoint where immeasurably helpful.     As a boss, Devon maintained a strong balance between approachability, friendliness, and professionalism. He continually set high standards for the rest of the staff through his own teaching and general conduct. Outside of work, Devon routinely assisted coworkers and friends with personal projects and the daily difficulties of living in a foreign country.      I would also like to note how Devon routinely used his creativity, organization, passion for arts, and self motivation to organize events in the city.     Again, I strongly recommend Devon to any person looking to hire or work with an intelligent, talented, honest, hard-working, and friendly person. Please don't hesitate to contact me if you have any further questions.    -Wiley Skewes  wiley.skewes@gmail.com  Skype: wiley.skewes
